allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/equipements.json'\); const pieces = [...new Set\(data.equipements.map\(e => e.piece\)\)]; console.log\('Total items:', data.equipements.length\); console.log\('Sections:', pieces\); const dup = data.equipements.filter\(\(e,i,a\) => a.findIndex\(x => x.id === e.id\) !== i\); console.log\('Duplicate IDs:', dup.length\);")
